hooks.command: lint_out=$(task lint:new 2>&1); rc=$?; [ $rc -eq 0 ] && exit 0; issues=$(echo "$lint_out" | grep -cE '^[^ ].*:[0-9]+:'); printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"Stop","additionalContext":"task lint:new found %d new issues that --fix could not auto-resolve. Run `task lint:new` to see details and fix them."}}\n' "$issues"; exit 0
